Class BranchLocation

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.BranchLocation
public class BranchLocation extends Object
Describes a branch in a proof as a series of branch choices. Each branch choice is a proof node and the sub-node to descend into.

  • Field Summary

    Field
    Description
    static final BranchLocation
    ROOT
    Branch location of the initial proof branch.

    • BranchLocation

      public BranchLocation(ImmutableList<Pair<Node,Integer>> location)
      Construct a new branch location given a list of branch choices.
      Parameters:
      location - series of branch choices

  • Method Details

    • commonPrefix

      public static BranchLocation commonPrefix(BranchLocation... locations)
      Compute the (longest) common prefix of a set of branch locations.
      Parameters:
      locations - branch locations
      Returns:
      their common prefix

    • stripPrefix

      public BranchLocation stripPrefix(BranchLocation prefix)
      Remove a prefix from this branch location.
      Parameters:
      prefix - prefix to remove
      Returns:
      the remaining suffix

    • append

      public BranchLocation append(Pair<Node,Integer> newBranch)
      Add a branch choice to this branch location.
      Parameters:
      newBranch - branch choice
      Returns:
      extnded branch location

    • removeLast

      public BranchLocation removeLast()
      Remove the last branch choice.
      Returns:
      shorter branch location

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns:
      the length of this branch location

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Returns:
      whether this branch location is the initial proof branch

    • getNode

      public Node getNode(int idx)
      Get the branching proof node of the branch choice at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      idx - index
      Returns:
      branching proof node

    • hasPrefix

      public boolean hasPrefix(BranchLocation prefix)
      Parameters:
      prefix - other branch location
      Returns:
      whether this branch location is built on the provided location
